Package microui.util

Class SpatialState

java.lang.Object
microui.util.SpatialState
public final class SpatialState extends Object
SpatialState the class of states for SpatialAnimator

      public SpatialState(float x, float y, float width, float height)
      Constructs SpatialState with initialization
      Parameters:
      x - the coordinate state
      y - the coordinate state
      width - the dimension state
      height - the dimension state

    • SpatialState

      public SpatialState(SpatialView source)
      Constructs SpatialState with initialization of bounds from SpatialView object
      Parameters:
      source - is current source for copy state
